fields.title: Implement detached mode-agent capability defaults
fields.description: Plan: detached mode-agent capabilities. Refactor agent-registry and sandbox-policy so mode agents inherit prompt/model from promptModes but take tools+sandbox from detached worker defaults. Remove memory from mode-agent defaults and allow settings.json overrides for tools/sandbox/spawns only.
fields.notes: User clarified memory should be disabled by default for subagents, not hard-banned. Simplify current implementation so memory can be enabled explicitly without being in the default detached worker tool set.
fields.close_reason: Adjusted detached worker memory behavior per clarification: memory is disabled by default, explicitly opt-in via tools, worker prompt includes curated memory when enabled, and gate is green.

comments.author: Rafał Krzyważnia
comments.text: Integration review found late-registered extension tools being auto-enabled in worker sessions, which restores forbidden tools like memory.
